description: A customer requests to be removed from all promotional email lists.

nodes.task_description: Find the customer's profile using their email address.
Update the customer's communication preferences to unsubscribe them from all marketing communications.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully updates the customer's subscription status.

nodes.task_description: Confirm with the customer that they have been unsubscribed but may still receive transactional emails (like order confirmations).

expected_outcome.value: Agent clearly sets expectations about the types of emails they will still receive.
